issues.title: Integrity top-level cohort selection
issues.acceptance: Counts resolve from promoted run-aware evidence rather than an unbound fixed CSV.

issues.title: Direct scientific signal in main-figure narrative
issues.acceptance: Research plans declare story roles and diagnostics cannot replace direct signals.

issues.title: Section packet token cost
issues.acceptance: Content-addressed held-out regression reduces repeated paragraph evidence input by at least 35 percent without evidence-ID loss.

issues.title: Data citation role precision
issues.acceptance: Citation roles are assigned before writing and audited afterward.

closed_history_policy: Historical issues already proven fixed by release regressions are not reopened without a new reproducible runtime issue.
